full_text:
Yang Hu (Shuzi) 羊祜 (叔子)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Hu (羊祜), styledShuzi (叔子). A talented Jin officer. Held Xiang Yang. Formed a friendship with Lu Kang of Wu. Yang Hu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yang Hu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
